name: Monster Rebirth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>所</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a monster(s) was destroyed by battle this turn: Send 1 "Monster Reborn" from your hand or Deck to the GY, then target 1 monster in either GY; Special Summon that monster to your field. (This is treated as a Special Summon by the effect of "Monster Reborn".)
eff: If a monster(s) was destroyed by battle this turn: Send 1 "Monster Reborn" from your hand or Deck to the GY, then target 1 monster in either GY; Special Summon that monster to your field. (This is treated as a Special Summon by the effect of "Monster Reborn".)

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from Deck to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
Treats Special Summon as Special Summon with a different card
